ready_to_paste_codex_prompt: PHASE NEXT - DRY_RUN first. Continue from the active packet and do not stage, commit, push, delete, touch dashboard, broker/trading execution, scheduled tasks, startup tasks, or secrets.

validator_recommendation.recommended_validator_command: PowerShell parser check for changed .ps1 files, then git diff --check
validator_recommendation.reason: PowerShell files changed and should parse before staging.

approval_status.next_safe_command: No approval item is ready for APPLY.

powershell_command_block:
git status --short --branch
powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File automation/orchestration/handoff/New-AiOsCodexHandoff.DRY_RUN.ps1
powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File automation/orchestration/validators/Get-AiOsValidatorRecommendation.DRY_RUN.ps1
stop_conditions: Stop if any command requests APPLY without explicit operator approval.
Stop if validator recommendation says approval_required YES.
Stop before git add, commit, or push unless the operator provides exact commands.
